name: Viver Incorporadora e Construtora S.A.
summary: Viver Incorporadora e Construtora S.A. operates as a real estate development company in Brazil. The company primarily focuses on residential and commercial markets. It is involved in the construction, and sale of units. The company develops projects in the commercial, tourism, and land division segments. The company was formerly known as Inpar S.A. and changed its name to Viver Incorporadora e Construtora S.A. in April 2011. Viver Incorporadora e Construtora S.A. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
